app.name: Myy Signature Myy Style Salon
app.description: Premium hair salon specializing in expert cuts, colors, braids, and styling for all hair types with modern booking and payment processing.

branding.theme_description: Warm brown and tan palette with elegant typography. Sophisticated, minimal aesthetic with classic refinement perfect for upscale hair salon.

colors.primary_usage: 60% - Main background, navigation base, premium feel
colors.secondary_usage: 30% - Navigation links, text on dark, elegant accents

design_guidelines.title: Pro-Tips for Salon Web Design
design_guidelines.overview: Essential best practices for creating a modern, accessible, and visually stunning salon website that converts visitors into customers.

rules.description: Balance your color palette using a proven design principle that ensures visual harmony and effective hierarchy.

primary_60.usage: Backgrounds, large blocks, main navigation, footer

secondary_30.usage: Secondary headings, secondary buttons, cards, dividers, secondary text

accent_10.usage: Call-to-action (CTA) buttons, highlights, important elements that demand attention

rules.implementation: Use this rule to create a balanced, professional look that guides user attention naturally toward desired actions.
rules.pro_tip: The 10% accent color should ONLY be used for CTAs and critical user actions. Overuse dilutes its impact and confuses users about where to click.

rules.description: Ensure all text is readable by maintaining proper color contrast ratios. Poor contrast excludes users with visual impairments and harms SEO.

do_and_dont.dont: Light gold or light grey text on white backgrounds
do_and_dont.why: Creates eye strain and is unreadable for many users
do_and_dont.alternative: Use dark charcoal (#1B1B1B) or deep purple (#3B3B58) for primary text

do_and_dont.why: Fails accessibility standards and looks unprofessional
do_and_dont.alternative: Pair light backgrounds with dark text, or dark backgrounds with light text

do_and_dont.dont: Using color alone to convey information
do_and_dont.why: Color-blind users cannot distinguish the meaning
do_and_dont.alternative: Use text labels, icons, or patterns in addition to color

do_and_dont.do: Use dark charcoal or deep brown for body text on white/light backgrounds
do_and_dont.contrast: Dark text on light = maximum readability

do_and_dont.do: Use light grey or off-white for secondary text on dark backgrounds
do_and_dont.contrast: Light text on dark = high contrast and modern look

do_and_dont.do: Test color combinations using WCAG contrast checker tools
do_and_dont.reason: Verify all text meets accessibility standards before launch

contrast_examples.use_case: Primary body text on light backgrounds
Secondary text on dark backgrounds (minimize use)

rules.description: High-quality professional imagery is the foundation of modern salon websites. Your color palette must complement your photos, not overshadow them.
rules.importance: Photography accounts for 80% of user perception. Poor photos tank conversions, regardless of design quality.

requirements: Professional lighting (no shadows or harsh contrasts)
photo_essentials.tip: Invest in professional photography—DIY photos often hurt credibility more than no photos at all

requirements: Branded styling that matches salon aesthetic
photo_essentials.tip: Personal photos build trust. Show your real team to create connection with potential clients

requirements: Show styling stations, waiting area, amenities
Capture the salon's vibe and atmosphere
photo_essentials.tip: People book based on feeling. Your salon interior photos set expectations and build confidence

requirements: Optimized file size for fast loading
photo_essentials.tip: Hero images are the first impression. Make them count

color_palette_matching.portfolio_style: Warm Tones (Golden Blondes, Warm Reds, Caramels)
color_palette_matching.reasoning: Warm colors in photos complement warm color palettes without clashing

color_palette_matching.portfolio_style: Cool Tones (Ash Blonde, Platinum, Cool Brunettes)
color_palette_matching.reasoning: Cool palette (Future Dusk + Moonlit Grey) enhances cool-toned hair colors
The Zesty Yellow accent pops against vibrant hair colors without competing
Neutral photos work with almost any palette; prioritize clean design instead

photo_optimization.alt_text: Always include descriptive alt text for accessibility and SEO
tools: Squoosh by Google for format conversion

pro_tips: Hire a professional photographer for your portfolio. This investment pays for itself in bookings.
Update your portfolio quarterly. Outdated photos signal an inactive business.
Ensure your color palette complements (not fights) your photos. Test by placing color swatches over hero images.
Use consistent filters/editing across all portfolio photos for a cohesive brand look.
Show before-and-after transitions—they're powerful conversion drivers.

contrast_checkers.name: Contrast Ratio
contrast_checkers.description: Real-time contrast checker with visual preview

payment_processing.deposit_note: Deposit amount depends on service selected.

staff.note: Add additional staff members after client onboarding

careers.introduction: We're always looking for passionate, talented stylists who share our commitment to excellence. Join a team that values creativity, continuous learning, and exceptional client care.

benefits.title: Competitive Compensation
benefits.description: Competitive base salary plus commission structure and tips

benefits.title: Continuing Education

benefits.title: Flexible Scheduling

benefits.title: Supportive Environment

benefits.title: Premium Products
benefits.description: Work with top-tier professional products and the latest tools

open_positions.title: Hairstylist
open_positions.description: Join our team as a licensed hairstylist to provide exceptional hair care services to our clients
responsibilities: Provide hair services including cuts, color, styling, and treatments
Build and maintain strong client relationships
Stay current with industry trends and techniques
Maintain cleanliness and organization of workstation
requirements: Strong technical skills and customer service
Reliable and passionate about the craft

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Fill out our online application with your contact info, experience, and portfolio

steps.title: Portfolio Review
steps.description: Our team reviews your portfolio and application materials

steps.title: Initial Interview
steps.description: Phone or video interview to discuss your experience and goals

steps.title: Skills Assessment
steps.description: In-person demonstration of your technical skills (for stylist positions)

steps.title: Final Interview
steps.description: Meet the team and discuss compensation, schedule, and next steps

team_culture.title: Our Culture & Values
team_culture.description: We believe in fostering a positive, inclusive environment where every team member can thrive.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We're committed to delivering exceptional service and constantly improving our craft

values.title: Inclusivity
values.description: All hair types, textures, and styles are celebrated. We serve everyone with respect and expertise

values.title: Growth
values.description: Continuous learning and development are at the heart of what we do

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: We support each other, share knowledge, and grow together as a team

values.title: Authenticity
values.description: Bring your true self to work. We value individuality and creative expression

faqs.question: Do I need to have my own clientele?
faqs.answer: While an existing clientele is a plus, it's not required. We have a steady stream of clients and will help you build your book through referrals and marketing.

faqs.question: What products do you use?
faqs.answer: We work with premium professional brands including Redken, Wella, Paul Mitchell, and specialized natural hair care lines.

faqs.question: Is booth rental available?
faqs.answer: Currently, we offer commission-based positions. Booth rental may be available for experienced stylists with an established clientele—contact us to discuss.

faqs.question: Do you provide continuing education?
faqs.answer: Yes! We invest in our team's growth through regular training, workshops, and education reimbursement for advanced certifications.

faqs.question: What's the work schedule like?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible scheduling options. Most stylists work 3-5 days per week. We're open Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 10am-4pm, closed Sundays.

contact.title: Questions About Careers?
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you! Reach out if you have questions about open positions or want to learn more about joining our team.

booking_disclaimer.deposit_note: A deposit is required to secure your appointment (amount depends on the service). Payment options are listed below.
booking_disclaimer.cancellation_note: Cancellations made less than 12 hours in advance will incur your deposit service charge. No-shows receive no refund.
booking_disclaimer.late_policy: A grace period of 10–20 minutes may be allowed. Late arrivals may result in a shortened service or cancellation with applicable fees.
booking_disclaimer.confirmation_note: By completing this booking you agree to our deposit, cancellation, and late-arrival policies.

salon_policies.title: Salon Policies & Guest Guidelines
salon_policies.intro: At Myy Signature Myy Style Salon, we are committed to delivering exceptional beauty services in a comfortable, professional, and luxurious environment. To ensure a seamless experience for all clients, please review our policies below.

booking.title: Booking Policy
points: All appointments must be scheduled through our official booking system.
A deposit is required to secure your booking — amount depends on the service.
Please ensure you book the correct service to allow proper timing.
For questions or service clarification, contact us directly before booking.

confirmation.title: Appointment Confirmation
points: A confirmation reminder will be sent 24–48 hours prior to your appointment.
Clients are required to confirm their appointment via the provided link.
Failure to confirm may result in automatic cancellation and loss of your reserved time.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.intro: We understand that schedules may change; however, we kindly request:
points: A call or text to notify us of any changes as early as possible.
Cancellations made less than 12 hours in advance will incur your deposit service charge.
No-shows receive no refund.

deposits.title: Deposits
points: All deposits are non-refundable.

late_arrival.title: Late Policy
points: Please arrive on time to ensure full service.
A grace period of 10–20 minutes may be allowed.
Late arrivals may result in a shortened service or cancellation, with applicable fees.

payment.title: Payment Policy
points: All payments must be made through approved salon payment methods only.
We accept: card, Cash App, Zelle, and other approved options.
No personal payments to stylists are permitted.

salon_experience.title: Salon Experience
points: We strive to provide a peaceful and relaxing atmosphere.
Please respect all staff and guests at all times.
Only serviced kids allowed; additional children must remain seated and supervised.

service_guarantee.title: Service Guarantee
service_guarantee.text: Your satisfaction is important to us. If you experience any concerns, please notify us within 48 hours of your service so we can address it promptly.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.text: At Myy Signature Myy Style Salon, our goal is simple: To enhance your beauty while ensuring your comfort, every visit.

message_modal.title: Send us a Message
message_modal.success_message: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you soon!
